product_overview: KT-Market is a commerce and admin web application built with Next.js and Supabase that offers a secure and efficient platform for users to authenticate, browse products and events, and for admins to manage product and event data via a protected dashboard.
core_goals: Provide seamless authentication and session management using Supabase SSR.
Ensure secure admin access with strict role based authorization checks at middleware and database level.
Deliver a performant user experience through clear separation of server and client components.
Maintain high code quality and type safety with strict TypeScript conventions.
Implement a scalable UI with Tailwind CSS and a consistent design system.
key_features: User Authentication including login, signup, logout, and session management using Supabase SSR.
Global Navigation Header with user menu and dynamic authentication state display.
Protected Admin Dashboard with role-based access control for managing products and events.
Clear separation of Client and Server components to optimize performance and security.
Robust middleware enforcing session validation and admin authorization checks.
Use of Zustand for client state management and TanStack Query for server state synchronization.
user_flow_summary: Users visit the home route and can sign up or log in using the authentication system.
Once authenticated, users can browse products and events with their session maintained via SSR.
Admins navigate to the /admin route, where the middleware verifies login and admin status before granting access.
Admins manage products and events in a dashboard interface designed for secure and efficient content management.
Users can log out, which clears their session and redirects them appropriately.
validation_criteria: All authentication flows correctly handle session states and edge cases.
Admin routes enforce strict RBAC - only authorized users can access /admin area.
No sensitive environment variables or service keys are exposed to the client.
Server and client components are properly separated to prevent security leaks and optimize performance.
TypeScript strict typing is maintained with no use of any type.
UI elements adhere to the Tailwind CSS based design system and render correctly across devices.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User authentication using Supabase SSR, including Login, Signup, Logout, and Session Management.

features.description: Navigation header with User Menu and Auth state display.
